title: Biryani Peppery Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired dish made with peppery chicken, turkish spices, and basmati rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add turkish pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Stir in peppery spice blend, salt, and biryani masala. Cook for 1 minute.
Add basmati rice to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until rice is cooked and liquid is absorbed.
Fluff rice with a fork and serve hot.
